name: Iconosquare Social Media Analytics API
what_it_does: Iconosquare social media analytics REST API for brands and agencies to track Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, and Twitter performance, benchmark against competitors, and automate social media reporting. Enables AI agents to manage social profile performance tracking and follower growth analytics for social KPI automation, handle content performance analysis and best time to post recommendations for publishing optimization automation, access competitor benchmarking and industry comparison for competitive intelligence automation, retrieve hashtag analytics and tracking for content strategy automation, manage multi-profile agency dashboard for client reporting automation, handle custom report generation and scheduled reporting for social analytics automation, access story and reel performance metrics for video content analytics automation, retrieve audience demographics and follower quality analysis for targeting automation, manage media monitoring and brand mention tracking for brand health automation, and integrate Iconosquare with Google Sheets, Slack, and BI platforms for end-to-end social analytics workflow.
use_cases: Tracking Instagram performance from social KPI automation agents
Benchmarking competitors from social intelligence agents
Generating client reports from agency reporting agents
Analyzing hashtag strategy from content optimization agents
not_for: Social publishing and scheduling (Iconosquare is analytics-focused; use Later or Loomly for publishing)
Social customer care and inbox management (use Agorapulse or Sprout Social)
Enterprise cross-channel social management with publishing
best_when: A brand or social media agency wanting AI agents to automate Instagram and multi-platform social analytics, competitor benchmarking, hashtag tracking, and automated client reporting through Iconosquare's analytics platform.
avoid_when: INSTAGRAM API RATE LIMITS PROPAGATED THROUGH ICONOSQUARE: Iconosquare analytics data is sourced from Meta/Instagram Graph API; automated analytics retrieval frequency is constrained by underlying platform API limits; high-frequency automated metric polling via Iconosquare creates upstream rate limit errors not directly visible in Iconosquare error responses. HISTORICAL DATA DEPTH LIMITATION FOR ANALYTICS: Iconosquare historical data availability varies by metric and social platform; some analytics metrics have 2-year historical limit while others have shorter windows; automated trending analysis using Iconosquare must verify historical depth for target metrics before querying multi-year historical ranges. COMPETITOR ANALYSIS PUBLIC DATA ONLY: Iconosquare competitor benchmarking uses publicly available social profile data only; automated competitive intelligence cannot access competitors' private or paid performance metrics; automated competitive analysis must scope expectations to public engagement rate, follower count, and post frequency metrics only.

auth.notes: Iconosquare uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for integrations. REST API with JSON. Limoges, France HQ. Founded 2011 by Jerome Lapierre. Bootstrapped / profitable. Products: Instagram analytics, multi-platform social analytics, competitor benchmarking, hashtag tracking, agency dashboard, scheduled reports. Platforms: Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, Twitter. GDPR. Serves 10,000+ brands and agencies. Competes with Sprout Social, Brandwatch, and Rival IQ for social analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free 14-day trial; no permanent free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Single ($59/mo, 1 profile set), Teams ($99/mo), Custom (agency/enterprise); annual discount available
pricing.notes: Limoges France. Bootstrapped. Monthly/annual subscription. 14-day trial. Credit card required.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; analytics queries throttled by plan; historical data queries have stricter limits; no webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS FOR AUTOMATED ANALYTICS ALERTS: Iconosquare does not provide webhooks for metric threshold alerts; automated social performance monitoring must implement polling-based alert workflows; automated alert systems cannot receive push notifications from Iconosquare for follower milestone or engagement spike events

SOCIAL PROFILE CONNECTION OAUTH TOKEN REFRESH: Iconosquare requires connected social profile OAuth tokens to remain valid; Meta/Instagram OAuth tokens expire and require re-authorization; automated analytics pipelines must monitor token expiry and prompt re-connection before token invalidation breaks analytics data feed

REPORT SCHEDULING vs API QUERY FOR AUTOMATED REPORTING: Iconosquare offers scheduled report emails separate from API queries; automated client reporting should use API queries rather than scheduled emails for programmatic output; mixing scheduled report emails and API-based reporting creates duplicate delivery in automated agency workflows

HASHTAG TRACKING SLOT LIMITATION BY PLAN: Iconosquare hashtag tracking has slot limits by subscription plan; automated hashtag monitoring must verify available tracking slots before adding new hashtags; automated hashtag addition beyond plan limit creates slot quota error without graceful degradation

TIKTTOK ANALYTICS DATA FRESHNESS DELAY: TikTok analytics in Iconosquare may have 24-48 hour data freshness lag due to TikTok API data availability; automated TikTok performance reporting must account for data delay; automated same-day TikTok post performance reporting may return incomplete metrics for recent posts
agent_readiness.security_notes: Social analytics. GDPR. API key/OAuth2. EU. Social profile performance and audience data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Social analytics. GDPR. API key/OAuth2. EU. Social performance and audience metrics.
